title: Stop Prompting Claude. Use Karpathy's Method Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese outlines Andrej Karpathy's three-layer method for using Claude and Claude Code more effectively, claiming it enables 10x faster development than conventional prompting. The approach is contrasted with typical prompting patterns and presented as a systematic alternative to standard interaction with Claude.
writeup: This video lays out a three-layer method attributed to Andrej Karpathy for working with Claude and Claude Code during development, positioning it as an alternative to standard prompting. The focus is practical: improving development speed and productivity rather than treating prompting as one-off requests. It touches on prompt engineering, visual prompts, and agentic workflows as the building blocks of the approach.
